name: Matilda (Seikret from Monster Hunter Wilds)
description:
"Your Seikret isn't just for travel though—"

.

I played the Wilds Beta last weekend and I can't say that I want to pre-order the game. Gameplay aside, Seikrets aren't as fun as Palamutes IMO, but I still love these gliding dinobirds.

.

I wanted to make a bot with the Valentines day tag, so enjoy. I might make another Valentines day bot if I find a character that doesn't have a lot of bots. Happy hunting! Art by DizKnight

.

THANK YOU SO MUCH FOR 10 FOLLOWERS! 🎉
creator: asskeleton
